case_title: MARIO M. MALUNAY et al VS. DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY et al
cause_of_action: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS (COMPLAINT FOR FRAUD AND CONVERSION; VIOLATION OF ULTRA VIRES ACT; IMPROPER CONVERSION; FRAUDULENT MISREPRESENTATION; RECONVEYANCE OF PROPERTY...)

docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALUNAY, MARIO M. MALUNAY, ELEANOR C. AS TO DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS INDENTURE TRUSTEE FOR AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE INVESTMENT TRUST 2007-1, MORTGAGE-BACKED NOTES AND GRANTOR TRUST CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-1 AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING, INC. ALL PERSONS CLAIMING BY, THROUGH, OR UNDER SUCH PERSON, OR PERSONS, ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN OR INTEREST IN REAL PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THIS COMPLAINT AS "367 HEAD STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132" , ADVERSE TO THE PLAINTIFFS' TITLE THERETO, OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFFS' TITLE THERETO DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-18-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-15-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-03-2011

INVALID/RETURNED CHECK REDEEMED FOR TRANSACTION W0811615F014 FOR CIVIL COMPLAINT/PETITION/OTHER FIRST PAPER
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-18-2011 CONTINUED TO DEC-30-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-30-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-05-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-23-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-23-2012 AT 2:00PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
